name: Zerto IT Resilience Platform REST API
what_it_does: Zerto IT resilience platform REST API for enterprises to manage continuous replication, disaster recovery, ransomware recovery, cloud mobility, and long-term retention for VMware, Hyper-V, and cloud workloads — enabling automated DR orchestration, near-zero RPO/RTO recovery, ransomware journal recovery, and workload migration through Zerto's journal-based continuous data protection platform. Enables AI agents to manage virtual protection groups for workload replication grouping automation, handle failover operations for DR site switchover and test failover automation, access journal recovery for point-in-time ransomware recovery automation, retrieve move operations for non-disruptive workload migration automation, manage backup copy for long-term retention to object storage automation, handle pairing for site-to-site and cloud replication pairing automation, access alerts for replication health and RPO violation monitoring automation, retrieve analytics for recovery objective and performance reporting automation, manage cloud migration for VMware to cloud workload mobility automation, and integrate Zerto with VMware, Azure, AWS, and GCP for enterprise resilience automation.
use_cases: Automating disaster recovery testing and failover orchestration for enterprise BC/DR automation agents
Recovering from ransomware attacks using journal-based point-in-time recovery for cyber resilience automation agents
Migrating on-premises VMware workloads to Azure or AWS for cloud migration automation agents
Monitoring replication health and RPO/RTO compliance for DR governance automation agents
not_for: File-level backup and restore (Zerto is continuous replication/DR, not traditional backup)
Physical server protection without hypervisor (Zerto primarily protects virtualized workloads)
Database-only replication (Zerto is workload-level replication, not database transaction log shipping)
best_when: An enterprise DR architect, cloud migration team, or resilience engineer wanting AI agents to automate disaster recovery orchestration, ransomware journal recovery, and cloud workload migration through Zerto's continuous data protection platform with near-zero RPO.
avoid_when: HYPERVISOR DEPENDENCY: Zerto requires VMware vSphere or Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor for traditional deployment; automated bare-metal assumption creates hypervisor_required; automated must have virtualized infrastructure. ZERTO VIRTUAL MANAGER REQUIRED: ZVM deployment on protected and recovery sites is required; automated agentless assumption creates ZVM_setup_required; automated must deploy ZVM at each replication site. CLOUD REPLICATION REQUIRES ZERTO CLOUD APPLIANCE: Replicating to cloud requires Zerto Cloud Appliance in target cloud; automated native-cloud assumption creates cloud_appliance_required; automated must deploy ZCA in AWS/Azure/GCP. JOURNAL SIZE AFFECTS RECOVERY WINDOW: Ransomware journal recovery window is limited by journal size; automated unlimited-journal assumption creates recovery_point_expired for recovery points beyond journal retention; automated must size journals for required recovery window.

auth.notes: Zerto uses API key + OAuth2 for IT resilience REST API. REST API with JSON. Boston, MA HQ. Founded 2011 by Ziv Kedem. Acquired by HPE in 2021 ($374M). Products: Continuous Data Protection, DR Orchestration, Ransomware Recovery, Cloud Migration, Backup & Long-term Retention. Used by 9,000+ enterprises. Now part of HPE GreenLake. Competes with Veeam, VMware SRM, and Cohesity for enterprise DR.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial for qualified enterprises; production requires Zerto/HPE GreenLake subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per VM; HPE GreenLake consumption model; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Boston MA. HPE subsidiary. Annual subscription. 9,000+ enterprises. Continuous replication leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; replication and failover APIs throttled per ZVM capacity

known_agent_gotchas: VPG INTEGRITY IS CRITICAL: Virtual Protection Groups (VPGs) must include all dependent VMs for application-consistent recovery; automated single-VM assumption creates split_brain_recovery for multi-tier application VPGs; automated must group all application VMs in single VPG

FAILOVER TEST VS LIVE FAILOVER: Zerto has test failover (isolated network) and live failover (production cutover); automated test-mode assumption creates unintended_production_failover if live failover initiated without careful parameter check; automated must explicitly control failover mode

JOURNAL CHECKPOINT RECOVERY: Ransomware recovery requires selecting specific journal checkpoint; automated latest-snapshot assumption creates reinfection_risk if latest checkpoint is post-infection; automated must use anomaly detection to identify pre-infection checkpoint

SITE PAIRING PREREQUISITES: Site-to-site replication requires network connectivity and firewall rules between ZVMs; automated instant-pairing assumption creates pairing_failure without network prerequisites; automated must verify ZVM network connectivity before pairing

API IS ZVM-LOCAL: Zerto REST API is served by each ZVM locally; automated central-API assumption creates connection_error when calling ZVM at recovery site vs protected site; automated must direct API calls to appropriate ZVM per operation
agent_readiness.security_notes: DR and resilience. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. Protected VM replication and recovery data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Disaster recovery. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. VM replication and DR orchestration data.
